title: Currencylayer Quotes Response
description: Envelope returned by /live and /historical containing real-time or historical exchange rates keyed by concatenated source+target codes (e.g. USDEUR).

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the rates were published.

source.description: ISO 4217 source/base currency code anchoring the rate set.

historical.description: Present and true when the response represents historical rates.

date.description: Date the rates apply to (YYYY-MM-DD), present for /historical.

quotes.description: Map of concatenated source+target ISO 4217 codes (e.g. USDEUR) to the exchange rate.
